name: wilmingtoncc.org
message: "Wilmington Country Club, represented online as wilmingtoncc.org, is a prestigious private club located in Wilmington, Delaware. Established in 1901, it offers members a range of amenities including two championship golf courses, tennis courts, a fitness center, swimming pools, and fine dining options. The club is known for its rich history, elegant facilities, and a strong sense of community among its members."
